contentLength.description: Content-Length header value reported by the server. Can be `null` if not provided.

errorCode.description: Machine-readable validation error code. Can be `null` on success.

errorMessage.description: User-facing validation error message. Can be `null` on success.

hasEtag.description: When true, the server provides an ETag header for change detection.

mediaType.description: Detected media type. Can be `null` on validation failure.

valid.description: When true, the URL is reachable and serves a supported CSV or TSV file.
